title: Anatomy of a Simple Line Plot
description: A visual breakdown of the key components required to create and interpret a simple line plot for Exploratory Data Analysis.
relationships: The X-axis represents the independent variable (e.g., time). The Y-axis represents the dependent variable. Data Points are plotted at the (X,Y) coordinates. A Connecting Line is drawn sequentially through the Data Points to show the trend. The Title and Axis Labels provide context for the data being visualized.
